corrections.current: Α ἀπῆλθεν εἰς τὴν γῆν αὐτοῦ.
corrections.note: Left-margin line number 24 was misread as body text 'Α'.
Apparatus abbreviation is 'ms A a', not 'ns A a'.
Variant reading in V is παστω, not πτω.
Lemma should match body form ᾐχμαλώτευσεν/ηχμαλωτευσαν in pluralized apparatus spelling, not ηχμαλωτισα.
Printed apparatus reads 'τιμη αυτης', not genitive 'τιμης αυτης'.

corrections.current:
hab ες ονειδ. η τιμη
αυτ. ℵc.a
corrections.correct:
hab εις ονειδ. η τιμη
αυτ. ℵc.a
corrections.note: The preposition is εις, not ες.

notes: Running head matches. Body is accurate except the left-margin line number 24 at page start was captured as 'Α'. Apparatus mostly correct; verified line numbers 25–41 in right margin are not part of text.
